meaning_english: To support or confirm something (usually evidence or a story). Synonyms: Confirm, Corroborate, Substantiate.
When a scandal or trouble passes without serious consequences. Synonyms: Subside, Settle, Die down.
To succeed in doing something difficult. Synonyms: Accomplish, Achieve, Pull off.
To cause a particular reaction or to elicit a response. Synonyms: Evoke, Elicit, Provoke.
To win a prize or to handle a difficult situation successfully. Synonyms: Win, Handle, Manage.
To succeed as planned or to become detached. Synonyms: Succeed, Happen, Detach.
To prepare a formal document or for a vehicle to stop. Synonyms: Draft, Prepare, Halt.
To encourage someone to do something (usually something unwise). Synonyms: Incite, Urge, Goad.
To use something as a substitute when other options fail. Synonyms: Resort to, Rely on.
To defend yourself against an attack or a difficult question. Synonyms: Ward off, Repel, Deflect.
To imply something or to manage to reach something. Synonyms: Hint, Suggest, Reach.
To ignore or avoid dealing with a mistake or problem. Synonyms: Cover up, Conceal, Mask.
To follow rules or for time to pass. Synonyms: Follow, Observe, Elapse.
To resolve minor problems or details. Synonyms: Resolve, Settle, Straighten out.
To accept an opportunity eagerly. Synonyms: Seize, Grab, Embrace.
To maintain a safe distance or to withhold information. Synonyms: Withhold, Restrain.
To establish a rule or to sacrifice one's life. Synonyms: Establish, Prescribe, Sacrifice.
To reach an expected standard or promise. Synonyms: Match, Meet, Fulfill.
To steal something or to kill someone. Synonyms: Steal, Abduct, Murder.
To fall asleep unintentionally (usually while sitting). Synonyms: Doze off, Nap.
To admit that you have done something wrong. Synonyms: Confess, Admit.
To stop using or producing something gradually. Synonyms: Discontinue, Withdraw.
To succeed in doing something difficult or unexpected. Synonyms: Achieve, Manage.
To exclude something as a possibility. Synonyms: Exclude, Eliminate, Dismiss.
To explain ideas clearly or to begin a journey. Synonyms: Explain, State, Embark.
To resign from an important position. Synonyms: Resign, Quit, Abdicate.
To discuss a situation before making a decision. Synonyms: Discuss, Deliberate.
To test something to see if it works or if you like it. Synonyms: Test, Sample, Experiment.
To wait until an unpleasant event stops. Synonyms: Endure, Wait.
To give in to pressure or temptation. Synonyms: Surrender, Submit.
